title: Extend the Usage Stats to be Longer than One Month
excerpt:

posts.author: rchl (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Extend the Usage Stats to be Longer than One Month.

I was looking to create a sort of “2022 Year Wrapped” data presentation similar to what Spotify/Apple does but with analytics from the year for MDC. This would be a fun way to present valuable data to our leadership team.

With our current, monthly view of analytics, this isn’t possible. Seeing the year top creators/communicators and board analytics would be a great way for reporting in each of our regional offices.

posts.author: mitchellgp (Mitchell)
posts.cookedHtml: We were also hoping to do the same!! Would love this

posts.author: Hunter (Hunter Wallace)
posts.cookedHtml: Echoing this as a fellow December commenter (Tis the season!)
